items.description: Role metadata generated from metadata.rb
Handlers for nginx reload, fail2ban restart, and ssh restart
Default variables for the role
Main tasks entry point (mirrors default.rb include order: security, nginx, ssl, sites)
Chef attributes (sites config, security SSH flags) → Ansible variables
Entry point recipe — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites in order
Security hardening: fail2ban, UFW firewall rules, sysctl kernel params, SSH lockdown
nginx install, global config, security snippet, service, document roots and static files
SSL: openssl/ca-certs install, ssl-cert group, directories, self-signed cert generation per site
Virtual host configs (site.conf.erb × 3), symlinks to sites-enabled, remove default site
fail2ban jail configuration (DEFAULT + sshd, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch jails)
nginx security snippet (server_tokens, rate limits, buffer sizes, timeouts, SSL protocols)
Per-site virtual host config (HTTP→HTTPS redirect, SSL, security headers, gzip); rendered 3× with different variables
Global nginx configuration (worker_processes, connections, gzip, logging, includes)
Kernel sysctl hardening parameters (rp_filter, redirects, syncookies, IPv6 disable, etc.)
Static index.html for test.cluster.local document root (/opt/server/test/index.html)
Static index.html for ci.cluster.local document root (/opt/server/ci/index.html)
Static index.html for status.cluster.local document root (/opt/server/status/index.html)
Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for nginx configs, symlinks, SSL certs, document roots, fail2ban and sysctl configs
items.notes: 11 verification sections: nginx.conf directives, security.conf hardening, 3x vhost configs (stat+slurp+assert), sites-enabled symlinks, default site absent, document roots, index.html content, SSL cert/key existence and permissions, fail2ban jail.local sections, sysctl parameters, sshd_config hardening. Service/port/HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest.

items.description: No-op instance create playbook for delegated driver
Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection
No-op instance destroy playbook for delegated driver
Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, SSL dirs, document roots, fail2ban/sysctl configs)
items.notes: Recreates full /tmp/molecule_test/ filesystem: nginx.conf, conf.d/security.conf, sites-available (3 vhosts), sites-enabled symlinks, document roots, index.html files, SSL certs/keys, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, sshd_config. No become, no Docker, no include_role.

items.description: Created standard meta/main.yml
